treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with worsening slurred speech and unsteady walking.
MRI of the brain performed, no evidence of a new stroke.
Ultrasound of legs performed, no DVTs found but identified a small area of inflammation behind left knee.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up with PCP and specialist for treatment.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Symptoms likely related to fluctuation in previous stroke deficits.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient expressed acknowledgment of worsening symptoms associated with stress.
